lines.text: You want me to be you? (Be you) / You'll never be me, I might turn into you
That's all I want, to wake up with no makeup on / That's all I want, to lay around and not do shit / Take life slow mo' like on the radio

Yeah, that's what I need, the pink and white / And the blues and purple in the sky / That's what I need, the pink and white / And the blues and purple in the sky / And that's all I need, a pink and white / And the blues and purple in the sky
How come the sun always goes down while the moon comes up? / Time in a bottle won't last that long, some things don't change

You still popping lives on the boulevard / Breaking in windows, stealing hubcaps / They thought you were weird, now everybody acting like you're that / Louis Vuitton underwear shirt / That's a check I didn't cash
Billie Jean hot as July / 'Cause your boy ain't shit as this / Could be some niggas / Waiting on the next on the train at your next stop / They saying your name on the streets, it ain't hard to catch

But shit, don't give me no timepiece / I can't trust no smile / See between the lines / Swear I might rather be blind than witness everybody tell me lies that's a fact / (In other news, everything's tragic)
Pawn shop boys with the big fat chain / Pawn shop boys with the big fat chain
And that's all I want, to wake up with no makeup on / That's all I want, to lay around and not do shit / And life slow mo' like on the radio
If you could fly / Then you'd feel south / If you could die / Then you'd feel how I lived on the other side / If you could love / Then you'd feel west / What will I do? / Now that we're through?
Now you'll sleep east / You'll grow west / Our garden west / Pink in our cheeks, pink in our feet, red up to our knees
